allow: PowerShell($cmds = 'node','npm','python','py','firebase'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($p\){ "$c -> $p" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5510 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "server fermato" } else { "nessun server sulla 5510" })

Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/moul.html -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept-Language: it-IT,it;q=0.9' --max-time 30 https://www.moulinex.it/ricette)

Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/comp.html -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept-Language: it-IT,it;q=0.9' --max-time 30 https://www.moulinex.it/ricette/elenco/crp/companion-ricette)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code} type=%{content_type} size=%{size_download}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' --max-time 20 https://www.misya.info/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/straccetti-di-pollo-alla-pizzaiola.jpg)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code} type=%{content_type} size=%{size_download}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Referer: https://fornelli.example/' --max-time 20 https://www.misya.info/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/straccetti-di-pollo-alla-pizzaiola.jpg)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code} type=%{content_type} size=%{size_download}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Referer: https://www.misya.info/' --max-time 20 https://www.misya.info/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/straccetti-di-pollo-alla-pizzaiola.jpg)
